apis.name: animateTo
apis.purpose: Explicit animation through state changes in a closure function

apis.name: animation
apis.purpose: Property animation — automatic transition when component attributes change

apis.name: rotate
apis.purpose: Component rotation transform with 3D axis and perspective support

apis.name: transition
apis.purpose: Component entry/exit transition animation with TransitionEffect API

apis.name: opacity
apis.purpose: Set component opacity / transparency, inherited by child components

notableFindings: animateTo global version deprecated from API 18; use getUIContext().animateTo() instead
rotate supports RotateAngleOptions (per-axis angles) from API 20+ for 3D flip effects
rotate RotateOptions.perspective (API 10+) is key for 3D card flip visual depth
opacity is both a universal attribute (driven by animation/animateTo) and TransitionEffect.OPACITY for transitions
